narrative_beat: Overhead de teclado de celular com letras formando ARREBATAMENTO em dourado

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a pair of hands holding a smartphone seen from directly above, the phone screen glowing warm amber displaying golden ornate serif letters spelling a sacred word, thumbs hovering over the touchscreen keyboard
subject.focal_point: the glowing golden letters on the phone screen
subject.secondary: the hands illuminated by the phone screen glow, dark surface beneath
props: pair of hands with thumbs over keyboard

environment.location: a dark surface — table or lap — seen from directly overhead
environment.time_of_day: night, phone screen as only light source
environment.atmosphere: ritual participation, the viewer types their covenant word

composition.foreground: phone screen in warm amber and gold glow dominating center
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white dark surface surrounding the phone

lighting.key_light: warm amber glow from phone screen illuminating hands from below
lighting.fill_light: faint golden spill on surrounding surface
lighting.rim_light: gold edge on finger joints and phone edges
lighting.shadow_quality: deep shadows surrounding the phone glow island

style.post_processing: halation around screen glow, crushed blacks, amber highlights, subtle anamorphic flare
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, skin texture on hands, phone glass reflection, faint floating embers

mood.emotion: collective ritual, type the sacred word and become part of the remnant

symbolism.primary: the comment as digital covenant — typing the word seals participation
symbolism.secondary: phone screen as modern scroll of testimony

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks except the styled golden letters on screen
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only
tack-sharp focus on screen and hands

in_scene_text.medium: glowing golden text on smartphone screen
in_scene_text.font_style: ornate classical serif with golden glow effect, engraved appearance
in_scene_text.placement: centered on phone screen in upper half of frame
in_scene_text.legibility: crisp and readable, high contrast against dark screen

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.

api_call_hints.critical_note_for_gemini: The word ARREBATAMENTO must be spelled exactly and be fully legible on the phone screen. Use golden ornate serif font.
